title: GLM 5.2 FULLY FREE & FAST CODER: This AI Coder is CRAZY & WORKS!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an open-weight coding model available free through Big Pickle, a stealth model within OpenCode offering around 200 free requests per five-hour window. It achieves fast inference speeds and supports practical coding tasks including repo exploration, bug fixes, and refactoring.
writeup: The video covers Big Pickle, a free stealth model running GLM-5.2 inside OpenCode, with roughly 200 free requests per five-hour window. It matters because it offers a no-cost path to a coding model with reported low latency and fast inference. Key takeaways: the model handles repo exploration, bug fixes, refactoring, and feature development, and access comes through OpenCode under the stated request limit.
